subcodes.first_line: O My cherished friend! Thy letter was received, and from what thou hadst written therein the utmost joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار عزیز من نامه شما رسید و از آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید نهایت سرور حاصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
